skills: Intel Based Server and Desktop Platforms

experience.title: Information Technology Manager / Network Engineer
experience.description: Responsible for all day-to-day operations and functions of Wilkes & McHugh's six offices and 300 staff members. Lead a team of 6 IT professionals and Developers in the planning, upgrades, and implementation of IT systems, business applications, and development of new software tools.

experience.title: Network Engineer
experience.description: Administered and managed a Windows 2003 server network environment. Responsible for all LAN and WAN duties of local and remote Networks.

experience.title: Network Support Technician
experience.description: Provided network and desktop support to over 800 users. Provided technical support to all offices of the S.B.A.

extra_fields.certifications: Microsoft Certified Technology Specialist 2008 (MCTS 2008), Citrix Certified Administrator (CCA), Information Systems Management Certificate, Project Management Certificate
